title: Python Developer
description: About the Role: We are looking a skilled Python Developer with strong Google Cloud Platform (GCP) experience to design, develop, and support cloud-native applications and data solutions. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience building scalable applications, integrating cloud services, and working within highly regulated financial environments. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, test, and deploy Python-based applications and microservices. • Build and maintain cloud-native solutions using GCP services. • Develop APIs and backend services to support business applications. • Create and optimize data pipelines using GCP data services. • Collaborate with business stakeholders, architects, DevOps, and QA teams. • Implement security, compliance, and performance best practices aligned with banking standards. • Monitor application performance and troubleshoot production issues. • Participate in Agile ceremonies, code reviews, and technical discussions. • Document technical designs, processes, and deployment procedures.
description_html:
About the Role:

We are looking a skilled Python Developer with strong Google Cloud Platform (GCP) experience to design, develop, and support cloud-native applications and data solutions. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience building scalable applications, integrating cloud services, and working within highly regulated financial environments.



Key Responsibilities:

• Design, develop, test, and deploy Python-based applications and microservices.

• Build and maintain cloud-native solutions using GCP services.

• Develop APIs and backend services to support business applications.

• Create and optimize data pipelines using GCP data services.

• Collaborate with business stakeholders, architects, DevOps, and QA teams.

• Implement security, compliance, and performance best practices aligned with banking standards. • Monitor application performance and troubleshoot production issues.

• Participate in Agile ceremonies, code reviews, and technical discussions.

• Document technical designs, processes, and deployment procedures.
